title: Verify Remind Me toggle schedules WhatsApp notification
description: Test that enabling the Remind Me toggle correctly schedules a WhatsApp notification 24 hours before trial ends
preconditions: User has active trial with >24 hours remaining
User is in Trial Corner Manage section

steps.description: 3. Toggle 'Remind me 24h before trial ends' switch ON

expected_result: Toggle switches to ON state, confirmation displays 'We'll send a WhatsApp notification 24 hours before trial ends', remind-me-clicked event fires
